item.title: U.S. and UK release 10-point roadmap to align oversight of tokenized assets, stablecoins, and cross-border digital finance.
MiCA ends EU transition; only 230 of 3,000+ crypto firms hold licenses, leaving 10 million users seeking new platforms.
GENIUS Act stablecoin rulebook deadline is July 18; regulators must finalize bank-grade AML and identity verification requirements.
SEC plans to propose its first major crypto rule in July to ease token fundraising and clarify custody of tokenized securities.
CLARITY Act updated draft expected for Senate floor vote week of July 20; bill needs 60 votes as ethics provisions remain unresolved.
DTCC targets first tokenized asset trades in July ahead of October full launch; platform supported by BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan.
OCC grants Circle a federal trust bank charter, allowing federally supervised digital-asset custody operations.
Security researchers patch Aptos blockchain flaw that could have exposed $70 billion in assets to systemic attack for under $3,000.
BonkDAO loses $20 million in governance exploit; attacker spent $4.4 million to pass malicious treasury-drain proposal.
Interpol arrests 5,811 suspects and seizes $293 million in illicit crypto assets in 97-country coordinated operation.
EU Commission launches MiCA framework review; stablecoin interest prohibition and reserve requirements under reassessment.
Wall Street transfer agents urge SEC to regulate blockchain-based stock tokens, warning of risks to market integrity.
Summer.fi DeFi platform loses approximately $6 million in exploit detected July 6 by blockchain security firm Blockaid.
